_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: A significantly greater effect on dNF1‐KO cell viability was observed at multiple concentrations of CQ in serum‐free media after 48 h of treatment across all three assays
details: CQ showed significant and consistent effect on reducing viability, with greater effect than wild-type cells at multiple concentrations after 48h treatment
